title: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and ratings to choose the best email marketing tool for your business.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels in automation and CRM capabilities, while Constant Contact focuses on simplicity and local business features. This guide helps you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You need sophisticated automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
CRM functionality is essential to your marketing stack
You want advanced features like dynamic content and site tracking
choose_b_if: You're a nonprofit or local business seeking affordability and simplicity
E-commerce integrations and social media ads are priorities
You prefer straightforward event management and list-building tools

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is superior for businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring, with higher G2 and Trustpilot ratings. Constant Contact is better for nonprofits and local businesses seeking simplicity and e-commerce features at a lower price point.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at $12/month compared to ActiveCampaign's $15/month, making it the more affordable option. However, pricing can vary based on subscriber count and features, so comparing full plans aligned with your needs is important.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support email list exports and migrations. Most email marketing tools provide data export functionality to facilitate switching. We recommend contacting both platforms' support teams to ensure a smooth transition process for your specific needs.
